documentation:
# mapper-core

`mapper-core` is part of [Cobalt](https://cobalt.bluelightai.com), a toolkit for
illuminating and improving AI models and datasets. It implements the core
topological data analysis functionality that powers Cobalt's model introspection
capabilities.

Visit our website at [bluelightai.com](https://bluelightai.com).
